full_text:
Yong Kai 雍闓
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yong Kai (雍闓). Along with Gao Ding and Zhu Bao, rebelled in Southern Yizhou. Yong Kai was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom, Nanman, and the Wu Kingdom. Yong Kai lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
